channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies suddenly at 71
item.description: South Carolina Sen. Lindsey Graham, a staunch ally of President Trump and a long-time advocate for U.S. military action around the world, died suddenl...

item.title: Nancy Mace considers running for Lindsey Graham's Senate seat
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace (R-S.C.) is seriously considering a Senate run after Sen. Lindsey Graham's sudden death, sources say.

item.title: Inside Lindsey Graham's final push for Saudi-Israel peace
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly Saturday, spent his final weeks working on a new initiative to normalize Saudi-Israel relations.

item.title: Remembering tenacious, ubiquitous Lindsey Graham
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died at 71 from a brief illness, remained a persistent and influential figure throughout his career.
